videos.title: Spencer Pratt DISMISSES idea he doesn't represent everyone in LA #shorts #foxnews #politics
videos.author: Fox News
videos.description:
Los Angeles mayoral candidate Spencer Pratt dismissed corporate media labels as primary election results roll in, declaring himself a populist Angeleno who stepped up because 'enough is enough' to dismantle the city's status quo.
